title: Energy Minister Announces Emergency Measures To Address Fuel Supply Issues | 10 News
description: The Australian Government has announced emergency measures to ease the pressure at the pump. More than 700 million litres of petrol and diesel will be released from the reserves into the market in the hope it will ease panic buying and price gouging. title: Qantas To Pay $105 Million To Settle Class Action Over COVID Flight Credits | 10 News
description: Qantas has reached a multi-million dollar settlement with passengers for whom it failed to provide refunds following cancelled COVID flights. The flying kangaroo instead issued restricted flight credits when people should have been offered cash. title: AI War in Iran, Matildas Secret Trick, John Farnham World Record, New Sex Work Laws | 10 News+
description: The war in Iran is emerging as a turning point in modern conflict, becoming one of the first wars heavily reliant on artificial intelligence. Experts warn the conflict shows how quickly machines are moving into roles once held by humans — including making decisions that can determine life or death.  John Farnham’s band will play together for the first time in six years at a fundraising gig to help fans set a new world record for the largest-ever singalong to the star’s greatest hit.  Australia's emergency fuel stockpiles will be tapped for the first time in four years to allow more supplies to reach our struggling regions, but it prompts questions over whether petrol rationing will return as the Iran war continues to affect supply.  Ripping off sex workers could result in rape charges in New South Wales after a man was sentenced to six years behind bars for failing to pay for services, setting a new legal precedent and changing how consent is viewed.  Matildas captain Sam Kerr reveals the team’s mentality and preparation before their do-or-die game at the Women’s Asian Cup, which could lead them to securing a spot at the World Cup.  10 News+ LIVE: Trusted, in-depth reporting from Australia and around the world. 👍 Like this stream to support our in-depth coverage 🔔 Subscribe and turn on notifications for breaking news alerts ↗ Share this coverage to keep others informed  📲 Stay Across Breaking News 24/7 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/10NewsPlus/ TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@10newsplus/ Snapchat: https://www.snapchat.com/add/tennewsplus 🎧 Listen on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/0tWZ6sIJTQ2WHgYdjgaAA7?si=cb30d7fd3d3541fa  📺 Watch 10 News+ 6pm Monday–Friday | 6:30pm Sunday on Network 10 Missed the bulletin? title: Mystery Around Iran’s New Leader As Health Questions Grow | 10 News+
description: Questions are growing over the condition of Iran’s new Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, who has not appeared publicly since taking power. Despite his absence, Iran says it will keep the Strait of Hormuz closed — a critical global oil route — fuelling speculation about the leader’s health and who is directing the country’s war strategy.
